title: AuthorProfile Collection
description: Array of AuthorProfile records. Each element: Unified author profile combining publication record, artifact metrics, and AE committee service.

AEMembership.description: A single AE committee membership record.

role.description: Role on the committee. One of 'chair' or 'member'.
role.title: Role

AEMembership.title: AEMembership

ArtifactPaper.description: A paper that has an associated artifact evaluation.

title.description: Full paper title as it appears in the proceedings.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

badges.description: Artifact evaluation badges awarded by the AE committee. Canonical lowercase values: 'available', 'functional', 'reproduced', 'reusable', 'replicated'.
badges.title: Badges

category.description: Research domain: 'systems' or 'security', determined by the conference.
category.title: Category

artifact_citations.description: Number of times this artifact has been cited (via DOI tracking). 0 if not yet tracked.
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

ArtifactPaper.title: ArtifactPaper

PlainPaper.description: A published paper without an artifact evaluation.

title.description: Full paper title as it appears in the proceedings.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

PlainPaper.title: PlainPaper

AuthorProfile.description: Unified author profile combining publication record, artifact metrics, and AE committee service.

name.description: Full name in DBLP format, e.g. 'Mathias Payer' or 'Jing Liu 0074' (with disambiguation suffix).
name.title: Name

affiliation.description: Normalized institution affiliation, e.g. 'EPFL', 'MIT'. Empty string if unknown.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

papers.description: Papers by this author that have evaluated artifacts, with badge and citation details.
papers.title: Papers

papers_without_artifacts.description: Papers by this author at tracked conferences that do not have evaluated artifacts.
papers_without_artifacts.title: Papers Without Artifacts

conferences.description: Conference abbreviations where author has published, e.g. ['OSDI', 'USENIXSEC'].
conferences.title: Conferences

years.description: Sorted list of years with activity, e.g. [2020, 2021, 2023].
years.title: Years

artifact_count.description: Total number of artifacts authored across all conferences.
artifact_count.title: Artifact Count

total_papers.description: Total papers published at tracked conferences (both with and without artifacts).
total_papers.title: Total Papers

artifact_pct.description: Percentage of papers with artifacts: (artifact_count / total_papers) * 100.
artifact_pct.title: Artifact Pct

artifact_citations.description: Sum of citation counts across all this author's artifacts.
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

badges_available.description: Total number of 'available' badges across all this author's artifacts.
badges_available.title: Badges Available

badges_functional.description: Total number of 'functional' badges across all this author's artifacts.
badges_functional.title: Badges Functional

badges_reproducible.description: Total number of 'reproduced' badges across all this author's artifacts.
badges_reproducible.title: Badges Reproducible

category.description: Research domain based on conferences published at: 'systems', 'security', or 'both'.
category.title: Category

author_id.description: Stable integer ID referencing the canonical author_index. Null for authors not yet indexed.
author_id.title: Author Id

ae_memberships.description: Total number of AE committee memberships across all conferences and years.
ae_memberships.title: Ae Memberships

chair_count.description: Number of times served as AE chair (versus regular member).
chair_count.title: Chair Count

ae_conferences.description: AE committee memberships, one per conference-year served. Each entry has conference, year, role.
ae_conferences.title: Ae Conferences

ae_years.description: Year (as string key, e.g. '2023') → number of AE memberships that year. Example: {'2023': 5, '2024': 3}.
ae_years.title: Ae Years

combined_score.description: Total combined score: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score.
combined_score.title: Combined Score

artifact_score.description: Points from artifacts: each artifact scores 1 (available) + 1 (functional) + 1 (reproducible).
artifact_score.title: Artifact Score

citation_score.description: Points from artifact citations. Currently 0 for all authors.
citation_score.title: Citation Score

ae_score.description: Points from AE service: memberships * 3 + chairs * 2.
ae_score.title: Ae Score

rank.description: Ranking position among all author profiles (with ties). Null if unranked.
rank.title: Rank

AuthorProfile.title: AuthorProfile
